science.title: Gravitational Waves Leave Imprints On Light Emitted By Atoms
science.description: Gravitational waves are ripples in spacetime produced by violent cosmic events, such as the merging of black holes. So far, direct detections have relied on measuring tiny distance changes over kilometer-scale instruments.
